languages.original_text: "Unfinished service is sufficient reason to extend life, even if that life is marked by a flaw. Hypothetically, the stigma of psykerism is correctable... unlike death."

languages.text: "Незавершенное служение есть достаточно весомая причина к продлению жизни, даже если эта жизнь отмечена изъяном. Гипотетически, стигма псайкерства исправима.... в отличие от смерти".
"Unfinished service is sufficient reason to extend life, even if that life is marked by a flaw. Hypothetically, the stigma of psykerism is correctable... unlike death."
languages.original_text: "Незавершенное служение есть достаточно весомая причина к продлению жизни, даже если эта жизнь отмечена изъяном. Гипотетически, стигма псайкерства исправима.... в отличие от смерти".

"Unfinished service is sufficient reason to extend life, even if that life is marked by a flaw. Hypothetically, the stigma of psykerism is correctable... unlike death."
"Unfinished service is sufficient reason to extend life, even if that life is marked by a flaw. Hypothetically, the stigma of psykerism is correctable... unlike death."

languages.text: «El servicio no completado es motivo suficiente para la prolongación de la vida, aunque dicha vida esté marcada por un defecto. Hipotéticamente, el estigma de las capacidades psíquicas es corregible... al contrario que la muerte».
languages.original_text: "Unfinished service is sufficient reason to extend life, even if that life is marked by a flaw. Hypothetically, the stigma of psykerism is correctable... unlike death."

traits.locale_text: «El servicio no completado es motivo suficiente para la prolongación de la vida, aunque dicha vida esté marcada por un defecto. Hipotéticamente, el estigma de las capacidades psíquicas es corregible... al contrario que la muerte».

languages.text: 「未完の務めは、たとえ欠陥を帯びた生であろうとも、その生を延ばす十分な理由となります。仮説の上では、サイカーであるという烙印は矯正可能です……死とは違って」
languages.original_text: "Unfinished service is sufficient reason to extend life, even if that life is marked by a flaw. Hypothetically, the stigma of psykerism is correctable... unlike death."

traits.locale_text: 「未完の務めは、たとえ欠陥を帯びた生であろうとも、その生を延ばす十分な理由となります。仮説の上では、サイカーであるという烙印は矯正可能です……死とは違って」

languages.text: “使命未竟是延续生命的充分理由，即便那生命是有缺陷的。从理论上讲，灵能者的缺陷尚可修正……而死亡却无法挽回。”
languages.original_text: "Unfinished service is sufficient reason to extend life, even if that life is marked by a flaw. Hypothetically, the stigma of psykerism is correctable... unlike death."

traits.locale_text: “使命未竟是延续生命的充分理由，即便那生命是有缺陷的。从理论上讲，灵能者的缺陷尚可修正……而死亡却无法挽回。”

languages.text: "Unvollendeter Dienst ist ein hinreichender Grund, das Leben zu verlängern, selbst wenn es mit einem Makel behaftet ist. Rein hypothetisch ist das Stigma des Psionikertums korrigierbar ... im Gegensatz zum Tod."
languages.original_text: "Unfinished service is sufficient reason to extend life, even if that life is marked by a flaw. Hypothetically, the stigma of psykerism is correctable... unlike death."

traits.locale_text: "Unvollendeter Dienst ist ein hinreichender Grund, das Leben zu verlängern, selbst wenn es mit einem Makel behaftet ist. Rein hypothetisch ist das Stigma des Psionikertums korrigierbar ... im Gegensatz zum Tod."

languages.text: « Une tâche non terminée est une raison suffisante pour prolonger une vie, quand bien même celle-ci serait défaillante. D'un point de vue hypothétique, les problèmes engendrés par le psykerisme peuvent être résolus... À la différence de la mort. »
languages.original_text: "Unfinished service is sufficient reason to extend life, even if that life is marked by a flaw. Hypothetically, the stigma of psykerism is correctable... unlike death."

traits.locale_text: « Une tâche non terminée est une raison suffisante pour prolonger une vie, quand bien même celle-ci serait défaillante. D'un point de vue hypothétique, les problèmes engendrés par le psykerisme peuvent être résolus... À la différence de la mort. »

languages.text: "Yarım kalmış bir hizmet, o yaşam bir kusurla işaretlenmiş olsa bile hayatı uzatmak için yeterli bir nedendir. Varsayımsal olarak ruhsezerizm damgası düzeltilebilir... Ölümün aksine."
languages.original_text: "Unfinished service is sufficient reason to extend life, even if that life is marked by a flaw. Hypothetically, the stigma of psykerism is correctable... unlike death."
